summary: E6 Testing Complete: Compliance Intelligence Engine v3.0 fully functional. All 50 backend tests pass (11 new for Score Engine). All 6 /api/score/* endpoints working correctly. Intelligence Center page loads with all components: main score ring, agent ranking, standard scores, insights, remediations, top risks. Overview page shows Governance Score KPI as first card. Sidebar shows Intelligence Center navigation. All previous features (Agents, Policies, Audit, Compliance, SOX Wizard, Policy Engine, ARIA) still work.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 on initial load - Recharts ResponsiveContainer warning, charts render correctly after layout settles (same as E5)

passed_tests: Backend: All 50 pytest tests pass (11 new for Score Engine)
Backend: GET /api/score/overview returns valid score with explainability payload
Backend: GET /api/score/agents returns all 14 agents with scores and breakdowns
Backend: GET /api/score/agents/{id} returns single agent score
Backend: GET /api/score/agents/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: GET /api/score/standards returns 8 standards with scores
Backend: GET /api/score/history returns snapshots
Backend: GET /api/score/insights returns structured insights with remediations
Backend: Score has conflict_penalty for agents with unresolved conflicts
Backend: Score bands distribution is realistic (multiple bands present)
Backend: Remediations have impact scores
Frontend: Intelligence Center page loads at /dashboard/intelligence
Frontend: Main score ring shows 55/100 with WARNING band
Frontend: Score Composition shows Agent Avg 41.9%, Standard Avg 66.6%, 7 Open Conflicts, 8 Standards
Frontend: Agent Distribution pie chart shows strong: 3, warning: 3, critical: 8
Frontend: Agent Scores (lowest first) shows 6 agents with scores and critical badges
Frontend: Score by Regulatory Standard shows all 8 standards with scores
Frontend: Active Insights section shows 8 agents in critical state
Frontend: Priority Remediations section shows actionable items with impact
Frontend: Top Risks section shows conflicts, gaps, insufficient controls
Frontend: Missing Controls section shows agents without governance policies
Frontend: Overview page shows Governance Score KPI as first card (55% WARNING)
Frontend: Sidebar shows Intelligence Center navigation item with Brain icon
Frontend: All previous features still work (Agents, Policies, Audit, Compliance, SOX Wizard, Policy Engine, ARIA)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created for E6. Uses existing agents, policies, conflicts from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: E6 Compliance Intelligence Engine complete. New endpoints: GET /api/score/overview (with explainability), GET /api/score/agents, GET /api/score/agents/{id}, GET /api/score/standards, GET /api/score/history, GET /api/score/insights. Scoring engine in services/compliance_engine.py is deterministic (no LLM). Frontend IntelligenceCenterPage.js uses Recharts RadialBarChart for score ring and PieChart for agent distribution. Overview page has Governance Score KPI as first card. Sidebar has Intelligence Center nav item with Brain icon. Previous iterations: iteration_8.json (E5 Policy Guidance), iteration_7.json (E4 Policy Engine), iteration_6.json (E3 DLgs262+Readiness).

new_backend_endpoints.score_overview: GET /api/score/overview - returns overall governance score with explainability
new_backend_endpoints.score_agents: GET /api/score/agents - returns all agents with scores and breakdowns
new_backend_endpoints.score_agent_single: GET /api/score/agents/{id} - returns single agent score (404 for non-existent)
new_backend_endpoints.score_history: GET /api/score/history - returns score snapshots for trend analysis
new_backend_endpoints.score_insights: GET /api/score/insights - returns structured insights with remediations

scoring_engine.methodology: risk-weighted base + policy coverage + audit outcomes - conflict penalties
